ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the clothing item (e.g., shirt, dress) */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who designed the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color(s) available for the clothing item */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season(s) the clothing item is suitable for */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the designer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the designer's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., Small, Medium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* Equivalent size in other countries */,
  "recommended_body_type" TEXT /* Body type for which the size is best suited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size specification */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust size measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam length measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_opening" INTEGER /* Sleeve opening measurement in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_specifications_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_specifications_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy level of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retail_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retail location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the retail location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the retail location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the retail location */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the retail location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the retail location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retail_locations_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse storing the item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retail location selling the item */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "alert_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if an alert is needed for low stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES retail_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source warehouse or retail location */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination warehouse or retail location */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items shipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES retail_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., warehouse staff, retail associate, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the inventory data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
